name: T-UI-26 - Verify that User views Plants page and all management controls are hidden
scenarioId: plants/ui_plants:T-UI-26 - Verify that User views Plants page and all management controls are hidden
methodName: T-UI-26 - Verify that User views Plants page and all management controls are hidden

testSteps.description: Given I log in as User with username "testuser" and password "test123"
When I navigate to the plants list page
Then validate the "Add a Plant" button should not be visible on the plants page
And no Edit or Delete icons should be present in any plant row
And the Actions column should not be visible in the plants table

exception.message:
[Actions column header should NOT be visible for a normal User (BUG-004)] 
Expecting value to be false but was true

stackTrace.methodName: the Actions column should not be visible in the plants table
